user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of attendance email templates with their type and description, so that I know which email notifications exist
acceptance_criteria: Given attendance email templates exist; When I open the Email Templates screen; Then each template is listed with its email type and description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of an individual email template, so that I can review its content before it is sent
acceptance_criteria: Given an email template is listed; When I click View for that template; Then its details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the email templates list, so that I can access all templates beyond the first page
acceptance_criteria: Given there are more templates than fit on one page; When I click next or last; Then the subsequent page of templates is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the email templates list, so that I always see the latest templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
